top3.sql:
WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', insert_date) AS year,
        strftime('%m', insert_date) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS cities_added
    FROM cities
    WHERE insert_date >= '2021-01-01' AND insert_date <= '2023-06-30'
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y', insert_date), strftime('%m', insert_date)
),
running_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        month,
        cities_added,
        SUM(cities_added) OVER (
            PARTITION BY month 
            ORDER BY year 
     ...
